_note: Per-product preview mockup config. mockup_url is served from Vite's publicDir (static/), so the value lives at /mockups/<file>.png at runtime. placeholder is the print-area rectangle in mockup-pixel space; the merch picker compositor draws the user's drawing into that rect. The current PNGs in static/mockups/ are dev placeholders — flat-color silhouettes with a clearly-marked print area. Operator should swap them for real Printify mockups (see follow-up issue for the script).
